title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They’ve tried resetting their password multiple times but still facing the issue.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending in 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not responding.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets 'Upload Failed' error.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive a confirmation email even though payment succeeded.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer reports that the password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer experiencing very slow loading time on the dashboard page.

title: Coupon Code Not Working
description: Customer tried applying a discount coupon but it shows 'Invalid Code' message.

title: Account Suspended Unexpectedly
description: Customer’s account was suspended without any prior warning or explanation.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Customer receives a 500 Internal Server Error while trying to complete checkout.
